body:
dms 将dms文件转换为乐谱
@param file 传入的文件 @param domiso GenshinDoMiSo实例 @return 处理后得到的乐谱 >
plugin io fileIO = open(file("auto_save.txt")) input = fileIO.input() result = str(input.readAllBytes()) fileIO.close() domiso.changeAutoProcess(result) return result
plugin io fileIO = open(file("auto_save.txt")) output = fileIO.output() output.write(input.getText().getBytes()) fileIO.close()
content = readString(file) domiso.changeAutoProcess(content) return content
result_arr = dms(file) domiso.changeAutoProcess(result_arr[1]) return result_arr[0] + result_arr[1]
result = mid_parser.convert(file) domiso.changeAutoProcess(result) return "mid file"
do some ....
